what_it_does: Records metadata for a PNG icon asset named 'image (28)' in the design-assets channel, including blob reference, dimensions, versioning, authorship, and timestamps.
observations: Dimensions w and h are both 0 despite being an image record
The asset name is the generic placeholder 'image (28)'
Only version 1 exists and created/updated timestamps are identical
standouts: w and h are 0 for an image asset
generic name 'image (28)' with no descriptive label
conventions: versioned asset record with a versions array
concerns: zero width/height may indicate missing image analysis or ingestion issue
empty alt text reduces accessibility and discoverability
notes: A first-version, auto-ingested icon asset record that currently lacks descriptive metadata and nonzero dimensions.
questions: Why are width and height reported as 0?
What does the asset actually depict?
Is 'dragnet' the ingestion tool or the source collection?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to catalog a design-assets icon, but the actual content is a bare ingestion stub with no visual description and zero dimensions.
intention_signals: Capture a newly imported icon image into the design-assets ledger so it can be referenced by a stable image:// URI and versioned blob.
contribution: Provides a versioned, addressable metadata stub for a PNG icon asset, including blob reference and authorship provenance, which a fused system could link to actual pixel data and enrich with dimensions and alt text.
summary_for_embedding: Ledger record for a version-1 PNG icon asset in the design-assets channel with a blob reference, zero dimensions, empty alt text, and dragnet ingestion provenance.
intention_for_embedding: To register an imported icon image in the design-assets channel for later retrieval, versioning, and enrichment.
